lines.gurmukhi: ਭਣਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਨੋ ਰਵੈ ਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਮਨੋ ਮਨ ਪਵਨ ਸਿਉ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhanat naanak jano ravai je har mano man pavan siau amrit peejai |
lines.english: Nanak humbly prays, if the Lord's humble servant dwells upon Him, in his mind of minds, with his every breath, then he drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਨ ਕੀ ਚਪਲ ਸਿਉ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖੀਐ ਉਡੈ ਨਹ ਹੰਸੁ ਨਹ ਕੰਧੁ ਛੀਜੈ ॥੩॥੯॥
lines.translit: meen kee chapal siau jugat man raakheeai uddai neh hans neh kandh chheejai |3|9|
lines.english: In this way, the fickle fish of the mind will be held steady; the swan-soul shall not fly away, and the body-wall shall not crumble. ||3||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਜਲ ਸਿਰਿ ਤਰਿ ਟਿਕੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਵਖਰੁ ਜਿਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: bohith jal sir tar ttikai saachaa vakhar jit |
lines.english: The boat crosses over the water, carrying the true merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੁਈ ਨ ਮਨੁ ਮੁਆ ਸਰੁ ਲਹਰੀ ਮੈ ਮਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa muee na man muaa sar laharee mai mat |
lines.english: Maya is not conquered, and the mind is not subdued; the waves of desire in the world-ocean are intoxicating wine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਕੁ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਸੀ ਸਚਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: maanak man meh man maarasee sach na laagai kat |
lines.english: The jewel within the mind subdues the mind; attached to the Truth, it is not broken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਤਖਤਿ ਟਿਕੈ ਗੁਣੀ ਭੈ ਪੰਚਾਇਣ ਰਤੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raajaa takhat ttikai gunee bhai panchaaein rat |1|
lines.english: The king is seated upon the throne, imbued with the Fear of God and the five qualities. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਜੀਵਨਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਲੇਖੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab jot jagajeevanaa sir sir saachaa lekh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is the Light of all, the Life of the world; The True Lord writes His Inscription on each and every head. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਦੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa saachaa saahib door na dekh |
lines.english: O Baba, do not see your True Lord and Master as being far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸੋਹੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਆਕੀ ਮਰਹਿ ਅਫਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: maanai hukam sohai dar saachai aakee mareh afaaree |
lines.english: - whoever obeys the Hukam of the Lord's Command, looks beautiful in the Court of the True Lord, while the stubborn rebels die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਰਿਖੀ ਮੁਨੀ ਸੰਕਰੁ ਇੰਦੁ ਤਪੈ ਭੇਖਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan rikhee munee sankar ind tapai bhekhaaree |
lines.english: Brahma and Vishnu, the Rishis and the silent sages, Shiva and Indra, penitents and beggars

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਫਲੁ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਸਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin sevaa fal kabahu na paavas sevaa karanee saaree |2|
lines.english: without selfless service, no one ever receives the fruits of their rewards. Serving the Lord is the most excellent action. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਗਮ ਜੋਧ ਜਤੀ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jangam jodh jatee saniaasee gur poorai veechaaree |
lines.english: The wandering beggars, warriors, celibates and Sannyaasee hermits - through the Perfect Guru, consider this:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਧਨਿਆ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਗੁਰਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਿੰਮਾਣਿਆ ਤੂ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: nidhaniaa dhan niguriaa gur ninmaaniaa too maan |
lines.english: You are the wealth of the poor, the Guru of the guru-less, the honor of the dishonored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੁਲੈ ਮਾਣਕੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਕੜਿਆ ਨਿਤਾਣਿਆ ਤੂ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: andhulai maanak gur pakarriaa nitaaniaa too taan |
lines.english: I am blind; I have grasped hold of the jewel, the Guru. You are the strength of the weak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਦਰਿ ਢੋਈ ਝੂਠਾ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam binaa naahee dar dtoee jhootthaa aavan jaan |3|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, no one finds shelter in the Court of the Lord; the false come and go in reincarnation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਮ ਜਪਾ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: hom japaa nahee jaaniaa guramatee saach pachhaan |
lines.english: He is not known through burnt offerings and ritual chanting; the True Lord is known through the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਜੀਐ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮੈਲਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan ratan man maajeeai bahurr na mailaa hoe |
lines.english: When the mind is cleaned with the jewel of spiritual wisdom, it does not become dirty again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਾਚੇ ਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa naam salaaheeai saache te tripat hoe |
lines.english: So praise the True Name, and through the True Name, you will find satisfaction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag saahib man vasai tab lag bighan na hoe |
lines.english: As long as the Lord and Master dwells in the mind, no obstacles are encountered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਰੁ ਦੇ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak sir de chhutteeai man tan saachaa soe |4|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, giving one's head, one is emancipated, and the mind and body become true. ||4||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰਮਾਇਲੁ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jogee jugat naam niramaaeil taa kai mail na raatee |
lines.english: The Yogi who is joined to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is pure; he is not stained by even a particle of dirt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਨਾਥੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਗੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਗਤਿ ਬੀਤੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: preetam naath sadaa sach sange janam maran gat beetee |1|
lines.english: The True Lord, his Beloved, is always with him; the rounds of birth and death are ended for him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਸਾਈ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: gusaaee teraa kahaa naam kaise jaatee |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, what is Your Name, and what is it like?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਉ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਵਹਿ ਪੂਛਉ ਬਾਤ ਨਿਰੰਤੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tau bheetar mehal bulaaveh poochhau baat nirantee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If You summon me into the Mansion of Your Presence, I will ask You, how I can become one with You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨ ਇਸਨਾਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਪੂਜੇ ਪਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: brahaman braham giaan isanaanee har gun pooje paatee |
lines.english: He alone is a Brahmin, who takes his cleansing bath in the spiritual wisdom of God, and whose leaf-offerings in worship are the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਏਕਾ ਜੋਤੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eko naam ek naaraaein tribhavan ekaa jotee |2|
lines.english: The One Name, the One Lord, and His One Light pervade the three worlds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਡੰਡੀ ਇਹੁ ਘਟੁ ਛਾਬਾ ਤੋਲਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਜਾਚੀ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa ddanddee ihu ghatt chhaabaa tolau naam ajaachee |
lines.english: My tongue is the balance of the scale, and this heart of mine is the pan of the scale; I weigh the immeasurable Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਹਾਟੁ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਇਕ ਭਾਤੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eko haatt saahu sabhanaa sir vanajaare ik bhaatee |3|
lines.english: There is one store, and one banker above all; the merchants deal in the one commodity. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸਾਏ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਏ ਸਦਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabad vasaae bharam chukaae sadaa sevak din raatee |4|
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad abides within, and doubt is ended, for those who constantly serve, day and night. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵੈ ਸਿਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਨਿਬੇੜੇ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਜੀਅਹੁ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਭਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: dovai sire satiguroo niberre so boojhai jis ek liv laagee jeeahu rahai nibharaatee |
lines.english: The True Guru saves us at both ends; he alone understands, who is lovingly focused on the One Lord; his inner being remains free of doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਪਰਿ ਗਗਨੁ ਗਗਨ ਪਰਿ ਗੋਰਖੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅਗਮੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਪੁਨਿ ਵਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: aoopar gagan gagan par gorakh taa kaa agam guroo pun vaasee |
lines.english: Above is the sky of the mind, and beyond this sky is the Lord, the Protector of the World; the Inaccessible Lord God; the Guru abides there as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਭਇਆ ਉਦਾਸੀ ॥੫॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee baahar ghar eko naanak bheaa udaasee |5|11|
lines.english: According to the Word of the Guru's Teachings, what is outside is the same as what is inside the home of the self. Nanak has become a detached renunciate. ||5||11||
